title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Luminous Power Technologies in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Luminous Power Technologies:
Luminous Power Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies!
